common_recommendations: Add immediate progress feedback to the primary CTA.
Show a concrete report preview above the fold.
Add pricing access to the mobile header.

reproducible_bugs.engineering_triage: Investigate after higher-severity blockers; observed in 2 of 2 runs.
sample_evidence: Observed no loading or disabled state after tap
Observed no loading text or spinner after click
sample_tester_reactions: I thought maybe my phone missed the tap.
I would probably click again because it feels like the button missed my click.
reproducible_bugs.title: Signup button has no loading state

safety_notes: No payment or production action was attempted.
sample_sentiments: I like the concept, but on mobile I felt less sure because pricing disappeared and signup felt unresponsive.
The idea is useful, but the signup moment feels fragile right when I am deciding whether to trust it.

subjective_ux_feedback.engineering_triage: Review with product/design; 1 of 2 runs reported similar friction, so validate before dismissing as taste.
sample_evidence: Pricing link visible on desktop, absent on mobile header
sample_steps_to_reproduce: Look for pricing from the top navigation
Try to compare plan cost before signup
sample_tester_reactions: I would worry this is hiding the price until after I sign up.
subjective_ux_feedback.title: Mobile navigation hides pricing
